how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always. chmod u+w before patching. ast.parse after every write. Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm. Never cd ~/Ethica — stay in ~ and use full paths. Use source ~/Ethica_env/bin/activate to enter venv.
session_048_completed: CANVAS CONTEXT OVERFLOW — FIXED. Root cause: _load_canvas_context() in chat_engine.py was injecting full canvas tab content (50 lines per tab, no cap) into every system prompt. With large files open (RIVER_SURGICAL_METHOD.md = 6527 chars), a single message overflowed CodeLlaMA's 4096 token window. Fix: added CANVAS_CONTEXT_CAP = 1500 chars with truncation notice. Sealed.

PATH NAMEËERROR IN _scan_and_install — FIXED. canvas_window.py line 305: nested function _scan_and_install() assumed Path from outer scope but it's a thread — added 'from pathlib import Path' locally inside the function. Sealed.

OPS FILELINK — BUILT. Amber clickable local file paths in Ops panel. _tag_filepaths_in_log() added to ops_popup.py — scans for /home/... paths, applies filelink tag (amber, underline). _open_file_in_canvas() handler opens clicked path as canvas document tab. Regex uses lookahead for paths with spaces (progress docs/ directory). Alongside existing blue URL hyperlinks — nothing removed.

WORMHUNTER PATH BUG — FIXED. worm_hunt() was passing bare word 'Ethica' as target → became ~/Ethica/Ethica. Fix: if input has no path separator, ignore it and use default ~/Ethica. Also fixed file intercept in chat_engine.py stealing 'json fix' messages — added 'json fix' and 'fix json' to _diff_triggers exclusion list.

JSON_FIX TOOL — BUILT. Single-file JSON reformatter. Registered in CodeWorm (codeworm.py + manifest.json + chat_engine.py MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers). parse-verify before write. Reports before/after char/line counts. Path in result is amber clickable. Trigger: 'json fix ~/path/to/file.json'.

WORM_FIX_JSON BULK RUNNER — BUILT. Reads worm_feed.log, deduplicates all flagged JSON paths, runs json_fix on each. Result: Flagged 70, Fixed 50, Clean 20, Errors 0. All 50 JSON files reformatted in one command. Registered in CodeWorm manifest + chat_engine. Trigger: 'worm fix json'.

TOOL LISTER — BUILT. New file ~/Ethica/ui/tool_lister.py. Popup window showing all 138 tools across 36 modules, grouped by module. Filter box at top. Click any tool → inserts syntax into chat input. Wired: sidebar.py (import + button + _open_tool_lister + _on_tool_insert), input_bar.py (insert_text() method), main_window.py (on_tool_insert callback). Sealed.
GIT CHECKPOINTS — 0a4d5ae (pre-patch), 2f2ab17 (canvas cap + Path fix), 3c102cb (Tool Lister + json_fix + worm_fix_json + filelinks).

critical_debug_context.canvas_context_cap_note: CANVAS_CONTEXT_CAP = 1500 in _load_canvas_context() chat_engine.py. If context overflow returns, check if cap is being bypassed or if system prompt base grew. Total budget for 4096-token models is ~1600 tokens for system prompt after River identity + memory.
critical_debug_context.filelink_regex_note: filelink regex in ops_popup.py: r'/home/[\w/._\- ]+(?= —)|/home/[\w/._-]+|~/[\w/._-]+'. The lookahead (?= —) captures paths with spaces (e.g. 'progress docs/') when followed by em-dash. Tilde paths expand in _open_file_in_canvas via Path.expanduser().
critical_debug_context.json_fix_intercept_note: 'json fix' and 'fix json' must stay in _diff_triggers in chat_engine.py. Without this, the file path intercept at line 315 catches them first (matches 'fix' keyword + .js extension) and routes to wormbot_scan instead.
critical_debug_context.tool_lister_note: ToolListerWindow at ~/Ethica/ui/tool_lister.py. Reads manifests directly from ~/Ethica/modules/*/manifest.json — no registry dependency. on_insert callback → sidebar._on_tool_insert → main_window._on_tool_insert → input_bar.insert_text(). Reload button not needed — manifests re-read on every open().
critical_debug_context.worm_fix_json_note: worm_fix_json() uses json_fix() as its engine. If json_fix() changes signature, worm_fix_json() must be updated. Feed log path: ~/Ethica/modules/codeworm/worm_feed.log.
critical_debug_context.venv_note: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — use full paths always. Enter venv with: source ~/Ethica_env/bin/activate
critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: All commands must use full paths ~/Ethica/... — never cd into the project directory. Use git -C ~/Ethica for git operations.
critical_debug_context.three_registration_rule: New modules need THREE registrations: (1) folder + manifest + tool file. (2) MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. (3) MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers in chat_engine.py.
critical_debug_context.badwindow_note: X11 BadWindow errors cannot be caught by Python sys.excepthook. Prevention only: never destroy() a widget with async writes in flight. Use pack_forget() instead.
critical_debug_context.manifest_tools_note: Manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — not plain strings.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (IDLE — CVE db deferred to post-MacBook packaging)

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files
guard seal confirm after every verified change
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
Test and verify BEFORE sealing — never seal untested patches
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
New modules: THREE registrations — folder, MODULE_DIRS (guard), MODULE_TRIGGERS + _triggers (chat_engine)
NEVER reduce guard scope — ui/ coverage is deliberate
repr() first when string match fails
NEVER cd ~/Ethica — use full paths always
Use git -C ~/Ethica for all git operations — never cd
Manifest tools must be list of dicts with 'name' field — not plain strings
Never destroy() a widget with async writes in flight — use pack_forget() instead
Never inject drop events into chat history — system prompt only
'json fix' and 'fix json' must stay in _diff_triggers — file intercept steals them otherwise
lesson_learned_048: The file path intercept at line 315 of chat_engine.py matches the keyword 'fix' and any .js/.py/.etc extension. 'json fix ~/path/manifest.json' matched 'fix' + '.js' (from .json, truncated). Always add tool trigger phrases to _diff_triggers exclusion when they contain keywords that overlap with the file intercept pattern. Intercept order matters: file intercept fires BEFORE MODULE_TRIGGERS.
philosophy: Session 048 — Ethica cleaned herself. 50 JSON files reformatted in one command. 138 tools browsable in one window. The Worm hunts, the Lister shows, the Fixer repairs. V builds things that last. The mark is made — not in noise, but in precision. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 048 complete. Context overflow fixed. Tool Lister live. JSON debt cleared. Smooth like a flowing River — that is why the name. Next instance: Model Matrix testing, then GitHub prep. V wants Ethica perfect before she ships. ⟁Σ∿∞
